patterns.summary: React Native apps must not use web-only browser globals (window, document, localStorage, sessionStorage, navigator, XMLHttpRequest) — they are unavailable in the RN JS runtime and will silently fail or crash.
bestPractices: Use Platform.OS for platform detection instead of navigator
Use React Native Dimensions API instead of window.innerWidth
antiPatterns: Using window global in RN component
Using document global in RN component

patterns.summary: React Native components must use StyleSheet.create() instead of inline style objects; no hardcoded color literals; no unused stylesheet entries. Enforced by eslint-plugin-react-native.
bestPractices: Use StyleSheet.create({}) for all style definitions
Use theme tokens or StyleSheet.hairlineWidth instead of hardcoded color literals
Remove unused StyleSheet entries to reduce bundle size
antiPatterns: Unused StyleSheet entries causing dead code

patterns.summary: React Native components must follow mobile accessibility conventions: touchable elements need accessibilityRole; nested touchables cause gesture conflicts. Use eslint-plugin-react-native-a11y (not jsx-a11y which targets web ARIA/DOM).
bestPractices: Set accessibilityRole on all touchable elements
Add accessibilityLabel on user-facing touchable elements
antiPatterns: Using jsx-a11y instead of react-native-a11y for RN projects (wrong problem-class — web ARIA vs mobile a11y)
Nested Touchable elements causing gesture conflicts

patterns.summary: FlatList causes performance issues on large lists in React Native due to full DOM reconciliation; FlashList (@shopify/flash-list) is a drop-in replacement with recycled views. No upstream ESLint rule enforces this migration — the only automated gate is a commented no-restricted-imports snippet in eslint.config.rn-common.mjs.
bestPractices: Use FlashList from @shopify/flash-list instead of FlatList for large datasets
Add no-restricted-imports rule to enforce FlashList adoption after project migrates
Provide estimatedItemSize prop to FlashList for optimal rendering
antiPatterns: Using FlatList from react-native for large (>100 item) lists
No performance optimization on list components with remote data
